tools.Name: DeepTutor
tools.Description: An agent-native personalized learning assistant that integrates chat, research, problem-solving, and math animation into a unified workspace.
tools.Use_Case: Automated tutoring, structured learning plans, RAG-based document analysis, and multi-agent problem solving.

tools.Name: GenericAgent
tools.Description: A minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework that builds a personal skill tree from a small seed of code to control system environments.
tools.Use_Case: Automating system-level tasks like browser navigation, file management, and software installation without manual intervention.

tools.Name: DeerFlow
tools.Description: A super-agent harness that orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxes to handle long-horizon research and coding tasks.
tools.Use_Case: Complex, multi-step research and development workflows that require orchestration of multiple specialized AI agents.
